item.name: Ruthenium Necklace Coffer (IL 655)
item.description:
A sturdy chest with dark metallic filigree that suggests a valuable accessory lies within.

Required level: 92. IL: 655. Necklace type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Give as Good as You Get
